problem_solved: Fragmented healthcare access with poor scheduling systems and limited digital front door for patients
solution_description: European healthcare platform offering appointment scheduling, video consultations, and practice management software. Originally French, now expanded across DACH region. Serves both public and private healthcare providers. Patient-facing app and B2B practice software
traction_signals: DACH region expansion from French base
notes: Leading European healthcare scheduling/telemedicine platform. French roots with German expansion. Not yet Nordic-focused but model is transferable. Strong patient digital front door
